name: Meta
description: Umbrella organization coordinating all 7 organ orgs. System-wide governance, cross-organ visibility, and institutional identity.
portfolio_angle: The meta-system itself is the primary portfolio asset. Demonstrates orchestration capacity, architectural reasoning, and systemic sustainability.

repositories.name: .github
repositories.description: Organization profile and community health files for meta-organvm
repositories.portfolio_relevance: CRITICAL - System-wide identity and entry point
repositories.note: Silver Sprint: org profile README expanded to 1,213 words (2026-02-10). GENESIS Sprint: promoted DESIGN_ONLY→PRODUCTION 2026-02-12.

repositories.name: organvm-corpvs-testamentvm
repositories.description: The authoritative planning and governance corpus for the eight-organ creative-institutional system. 149 registry entries, ~410K+ words, 42 essays.
repositories.portfolio_relevance: CRITICAL - The meta-system planning record; demonstrates architectural reasoning, AI-conductor methodology, and systemic execution
repositories.note: Initial commit 2026-02-11. 131 files, ~45K lines. Contains genesis transcripts, planning toolkit, governance specs, validation scripts, registry, cross-AI validation runs, and full execution history.

repositories.name: alchemia-ingestvm
repositories.description: The Alchemical Forge — Material ingestion pipeline and aesthetic nervous system. Three-stage pipeline (INTAKE → ABSORB → ALCHEMIZE) for deploying source materials, plus cascading taste profiles (taste.yaml → organ-aesthetic.yaml → repo-aesthetic.yaml) for autonomous aesthetic propagation.
repositories.portfolio_relevance: HIGH - Demonstrates systems integration, autonomous aesthetic governance, and material provenance tracking across 88 repos
repositories.note: Created 2026-02-12. Python CLI tool with 8 commands (intake, absorb, alchemize, status, review, capture, sync, synthesize). 6 capture channels (screenshot watcher, bookmarks, Apple Notes, AI chats, Google Docs, quick-capture CLI). Synthesis engine generates per-organ creative briefs. 19 tests passing.

repositories.name: schema-definitions
repositories.description: Canonical JSON Schema definitions for all eight-organ system data contracts — registry, seed.yaml, governance rules, dispatch payloads, soak tests, and system metrics.
repositories.portfolio_relevance: HIGH - Contract-first design for system-wide data validation
repositories.note: Created 2026-02-17. 6 JSON Schema files (Draft 2020-12), 3 examples, validator script, 11 passing tests.

repositories.name: organvm-engine
repositories.description: Core Python package — governance, registry, seed discovery, metrics, dispatch, and unified CLI for the eight-organ system. Consolidates ~30 standalone scripts into a proper installable package.
repositories.portfolio_relevance: CRITICAL - Crown jewel infrastructure; demonstrates systems engineering, governance automation, and architectural reasoning
repositories.note: Created 2026-02-17. 7 module groups (registry, governance, seed, metrics, dispatch, git, contextmd), unified CLI ('organvm' command with 12 subcommands), 192 passing tests. Pitchdeck generator, omega scorecard, context sync. Validates the production registry (149 entries), dependency graph (62 edges; 7 V4 findings), and seed.yaml coverage. Promoted LOCAL→CANDIDATE 2026-02-24.

repositories.name: system-dashboard
repositories.description: Live system health dashboard — FastAPI + Jinja2 + HTMX with brutalist CMYK design. 6 pages: health overview, registry browser, dependency graph, soak test monitoring, essay feed, omega scorecard.
repositories.portfolio_relevance: HIGH - Visual system health at a glance; demonstrates full-stack web development with institutional design aesthetic
repositories.note: Created 2026-02-17. FastAPI app with 6 routes, 7 Jinja2 templates, file-watching cache, 11 passing tests. Reads data from organvm-corpvs-testamentvm JSON files. Promoted LOCAL→CANDIDATE 2026-02-24.

repositories.name: organvm-mcp-server
repositories.description: MCP server exposing full ORGANVM system context to Claude Code sessions. Provides real-time registry queries, dependency graph traversal, and contextual awareness for any repo in the system.
repositories.portfolio_relevance: CRITICAL - Core developer infrastructure; demonstrates systems engineering, real-time context management, and cross-repo awareness
repositories.note: Created 2026-02-21. Python package using MCP SDK. Registers 15 tools across 6 groups: registry, seeds, graph, health, context, pitch. 24 passing tests. Enables autonomous cross-repo awareness for AI assistants. Updated 2026-02-24.

repositories.name: praxis-perpetua
repositories.description: Studium Generale ORGANVM (SGO): Internal university, research engine, process governance corpus, and publication house. Cross-organ intake authority for commissioning, evaluating, and certifying original contributions via IRA multi-model consensus.
repositories.portfolio_relevance: HIGH - Demonstrates institutional design, academic rigor, and self-governing evaluation methodology
repositories.note: Created 2026-03-06 as process governance corpus. Evolved into SGO 2026-03-19: governance YAMLs migrated from organvm-i-theoria/studium-generale (now ARCHIVED). 47+ research docs, 64 SOPs, full dissertation (SGO-2026-D-002), defense rubrics, faculty registry.

repositories.name: stakeholder-portal
repositories.description: Next.js stakeholder intelligence portal — repo browser, AI chat, system overview for non-technical stakeholders
repositories.portfolio_relevance: HIGH - Full-stack Next.js application demonstrating stakeholder communication design
repositories.note: Registered 2026-03-10 during three-organ structural audit. Previously untracked despite being listed in superproject CLAUDE.md.

repositories.name: materia-collider
repositories.description: Active experiment repo for material collision and cross-organ synthesis prototyping
repositories.note: Registered 2026-03-10 during three-organ structural audit. Experimental repo with seed.yaml.

repositories.name: organvm-ontologia
repositories.description: Adaptive structural registry — UID-based entity identity, temporal naming, event bus, sensing, inference, governance, state recovery
repositories.portfolio_relevance: HIGH - Identity backbone; permanent UIDs for all system entities, temporal naming, governed evolution
repositories.note: Created 2026-03-13. 44 source files, 353 tests. Ten layers: entity, structure, variables, metrics, events, sensing, inference, governance, state, registry. Zero runtime deps (stdlib only).
